purpose: Static planning-cost reference for ROAD mode. Provides rough ranges only, not live quotes.
known_limitations: Live rates, live tolls, ferry/tunnel prices, fuel prices, driver wages, border waits and carrier availability require paid/live data.
Ranges are intentionally broad to prevent false precision.
Costs exclude taxes, insurance, warehousing, storage, demurrage, currency conversion and special contractual terms unless explicitly stated.
Abnormal-load and DG surcharges are especially variable and must be confirmed by specialized carriers.

IRU_TI_UPPLY_ROAD_FREIGHT_RATE_BENCHMARK.title: IRU/Ti/Upply European Road Freight Rate Development Benchmark
used_for: European road freight rate trend context

UK_HGV_LEVY_VED.title: GOV.UK HGV VED and road user levy rates
used_for: HGV tax/levy concept and UK-specific cost component

CORTEX_AUTHORED_COST_RANGES.title: Cortex authored road cost planning ranges
used_for: static planning ranges where live quote APIs are unavailable
